title: Irony Detection in English Tweets
description: Fine-grained irony detection in tweets, distinguishing between verbal irony by polarity clash, situational irony, other verbal irony, and non-ironic content. Based on SemEval-2018 Task 3.
citation:

    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 12th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation",
    year = "2018",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/S18-1005"
}
